title: ageratina tomentella
intro: Ageratina tomentella, also known as Mexican mint or mountain mint, is a flowering plant species in the mint family that is native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ageratina tomentella include its ability to reduce pain, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Ageratina tomentella can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
